title: neobartlettia ehrenbergii
intro: Neobartlettia ehrenbergii, also known as the desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Neobartlettia ehrenbergii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
